title: The Skull Dome Battle Spreads
description: On pages 11–14, this part focuses on Unknown person #9, Unknown person #10, Yamato, Unknown person #11, Kozuki Alliance, Sanji as Battles spread through the Skull Dome while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the alliance shift the momentum.
scene: Across the Skull Dome, the alliance fights to survive while Tama, Chopper, Marco, and the Straw Hats change the flow of battle.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I don't have much time left.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: IF TANKI- San doesn't make it...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...and I'm on the Gusp of turning into an ice demon,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: You must end my life without hesitation!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll end up indiscrimimately killing everyone in this hall.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...He's right. If the boss becomes an ice demon, there'll be not stopping him.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: I'm counting on all of you.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Now us ex-mima- warigumi will find out...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I used to always wonder how things would've ended up...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you and I had challenged Kaido, back when I was in my prime.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: but not anymore. Kin'emon and the others...

dialogue.speaker: Kozuki Alliance
dialogue.text: Did a splendid job executing this raid!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I found myself an interesting protege!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: Now I know the sun will rise...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Hey, you gotta be kidding. Hell take out the whole floor if I don't stop him!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That hurt, bastard!! was that some sort of shock wave!?!?

summary: This part advances the Wano / Onigashima War storyline through 41 dialogue beats, focusing on the raid’s momentum, character resolve, and the shifting battle lines.
